title: Evangelion military vehicles
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion military vehicles             Quote Post by witshtgai » Sun Apr 22, 2007 4:05 pm like that guy Kensuke Aida i like military stuff and the vehicles in evangelion to me had an interesting design especially the vtol craft. does the vtol craft have an official designation?

[]: Re: Evangelion military vehicles             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sun Apr 22, 2007 7:46 pm witshtgai wrote: like that guy Kensuke Aida i like military stuff and the vehicles in evangelion to me had an interesting design especially the vtol craft. does the vtol craft have an official designation?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Apr 22, 2007 7:51 pm The Harrier is actually an aircraft, I'd say similar to the one Kaji takes when he leaves the battle in.. episode #9 i think.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sun Apr 22, 2007 8:45 pm slothen wrote: The Harrier is actually an aircraft, I'd say similar to the one Kaji takes when he leaves the battle in.. episode #9 i think.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Apr 22, 2007 9:07 pm im not trying to correct you, just making a more detailed distinction.

[]:             Quote Post by witshtgai » Mon Apr 23, 2007 12:39 am whats the address for Reichu's site and also are there any other sites dedicated to this stuff the harrier like plane that ryoji leaves in is a Yak-38 which is a soviet aircraft which kinda surprised me, would it be possible for them to have f-35bBs?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 23, 2007 1:09 am witshtgai wrote: whats the address for Reichu's site

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Mon Apr 23, 2007 1:40 am The VTOLs in Evangelion remind me most of the V-22 Osprey tilt-rotor craft, with a body pumped-up bigtime on steroids... You don't see V-22s much mainly because they have been undergoing all sorts of growing pains and are really hard to keep in the sky when they do work.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Apr 23, 2007 1:56 am same thoughts here on the osprey

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:16 am witshtgai wrote: whats the address for Reichu's site

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Apr 23, 2007 10:01 am Jay911 wrote: The VTOLs in Evangelion remind me most of the V-22 Osprey tilt-rotor craft, with a body pumped-up bigtime on steroids...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Apr 23, 2007 10:16 am A closer look at NGE's VTOL , I'm not sure what turbo jets are supposed to look like from the outside, but I don't see any rotors.

[]:             Quote Post by Rommel » Mon Apr 23, 2007 11:09 am There are all kinds of military goodies in the show. The Over the Rainbow is a Nimitz-class carrier, the planes are mostly Sukoi Su-27 Flankers, Kaji flees in a Yakolev Yak-38, the two battleships are Iowa-class, etc, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Mon Apr 23, 2007 1:33 pm BobBQ wrote: Jay911 wrote: The VTOLs in Evangelion remind me most of the V-22 Osprey tilt-rotor craft, with a body pumped-up bigtime on steroids...

[]:             Quote Post by Heinkel » Sat Nov 08, 2008 3:35 pm The Over the Rainbow is a Nimitz-class carrier, the planes are mostly Sukoi Su-27 Flankers, Kaji flees in a Yakolev Yak-38, the two battleships are Iowa-class, etc, etc

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sat Nov 08, 2008 5:10 pm The VTOL in NGE doesn't seem to be an actual design. To me it looks a bit like a cross between the Mi-24 and Osprey.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Nov 08, 2008 5:32 pm what does "Juusentouki" literally mean?

[]:             Quote Post by Heinkel » Sat Nov 08, 2008 6:13 pm LeoXiao wrote: The VTOL in NGE doesn't seem to be an actual design. To me it looks a bit like a cross between the Mi-24 and Osprey.

[]:             Quote Post by Heinkel » Sun Nov 09, 2008 2:33 pm I found it. It's the Dell-188A

[]:             Quote Post by Ingraman » Wed Mar 11, 2009 12:10 pm Another designation of the Bell D-188A project was XF-109. A real flying aircracft with the same configuration was the EWR VJ 101, an european project of the late '50, when everybody wanted VTOL capabilities after the fear of a massive soviet attack....The project was deleted in 1968 about. About the military designations in the series, they are NOT very realistic, despite the fact their design is usually based on ral vehicles. There is a couple of V-22 Osprey in Evangelion...have you find them?
